description: Two more instances surfaced in CI after the doctor.rs fix: src/commands/basic.rs:222 and src/commands/claim.rs:68. Grep the source for all occurrences and convert each to is_ok_and / is_some_and / unwrap_or_default as appropriate.
title: Fix all remaining map_unwrap_or clippy lints (rust 1.95) [bl-2fe1]
